steps.title: Trace the subscriber growth pattern
steps.content:
Start with 53 subscribers. Each day, the number doubles (multiplies by 2):

$$\text{Day 0 (posting): } n = 53$$
$$\text{Day 1: } n = 53 \times 2$$
$$\text{Day 2: } n = 53 \times 2 \times 2 = 53 \cdot 2^2$$

The pattern shows that after $d$ days:
$$n = 53 \cdot 2^d$$

steps.title: Match the formula to the choices
steps.content: The equation $n = 53 \cdot 2^d$ is equivalent to $n = 53(2)^d$. This matches choice B — B is correct.
